title: Carton and carton blank
abstract: A carton for packaging one or more articles. The carton comprises a plurality of panels for forming a tubular structure. The carton comprises an end closure structure for forming an end wall. The end closure structure comprises a first end closure panel and a second end closure panel disposed at least in part in overlapping relationship with the first end closure panel so as to define an overlapping region. The carton comprises a dispenser for facilitating access to the carton contents. The dispenser comprises a detachable portion formed at least in part by a first portion of the end wall. The dispenser comprises a first severance line (50b) in a first end closure panel (28b) and a second severance line (50h) in a second end closure panel (24b). A cutaway (R, 158) is made in the second end closure panel in a region where the first and second end closure panels overlap. A stopper wall is formed at least in part by a second portion of the end wall.
claims:
Claims A carton for packaging one or more articles, the carton comprising a plurality of panels for forming a tubular structure, the carton comprising an end closure structure for forming an end wall, the end closure structure comprising a first end closure panel and a second end closure panel disposed at least in part in overlapping relationship with the first end closure panel so as to define an overlapping region, wherein the carton comprises a dispenser for facilitating access to the carton contents, the dispenser comprising: a detachable portion formed at least in part by a first portion of the end wall; a stopper wall formed at least in part by a second portion of the end wall; a first severance line in the first end closure panel; a second severance line defined in the second end closure panel; and a cutaway defined in the second end closure panel, the cutaway extending from a free edge of the second end closure panel to the second severance line, and wherein the cutaway defines an edge of a portion of the second end closure panel forming a part of the stopper wall. A carton according to claim 1 , wherein the edge of the portion of the second end closure panel defined by the cutaway is spaced apart from an edge of a portion of the first end closure panel in overlapping relationship with said portion of the second end closure panel, wherein the edge of the portion of the first end closure panel is defined by the first severance line. A carton according to claim 2, wherein the edge of the portion of the second end closure panel is divergently arranged with respect to the edge of the portion of the first end closure panel. A carton according to claim 1 , wherein the edge of the portion of the second end closure panel defined by the cutaway is divergently arranged with respect to an edge of a portion of the first end closure panel in overlapping relationship with said portion of the second end closure panel, wherein the edge of the portion of the first end closure panel is defined by the first severance line. A carton according to claim 1 , wherein the cutaway is defined by a recess. 6. A carton according to claim 1 , wherein the cutaway is defined by a cutline arranged collinearly with the second severance line. 7. A carton according to claim 2, wherein the recess comprises a linear edge portion arranged collinearly with the second severance line. 8. A carton according to claim 4, wherein the linear edge portion is arranged divergently with respect to the first severance line. 9. A carton according to claim 3, wherein the cutline is arranged divergently with respect to the first severance line. 10. A carton for packaging one or more articles, the carton comprising a plurality of panels for forming a tubular structure, the carton comprising an end closure structure for forming an end wall, the end closure structure comprising a first end closure panel and a second end closure panel disposed at least in part in overlapping relationship with the first end closure panel so as to define an overlapping region, wherein the carton comprises a dispenser for facilitating access to the carton contents, the dispenser comprising: a detachable portion formed at least in part by a first part of the first end closure panel and in part by a first part of the second end closure panel; a stopper wall formed at least in part by a second part of the of the first end closure panel and in part by a second part of the second end closure panel; a first severance line in the first end closure panel; a second severance line defined in the second end closure panel; and a cutaway defined in the second end closure panel, the cutaway extending from a free edge of the second end closure panel to the second severance line, and wherein the cutaway separates a first glue area provided in the overlapping region of the first parts of the first and second end closure panels from a second glue area provided in the overlapping region of the second parts of the first and second end closure panels. 1 1 . A carton according to claim 7, wherein the cutaway spaces apart the first and second glue regions. 12. A carton according to claim 7, wherein the cutaway interrupts the overlapping region between first and second end closure panels so as to create a single ply region between a first two ply region and a second two ply region. 13. A carton according to claim 9, wherein a portion of the first severance line is provided in the single ply region. 14. A blank for forming a carton, the blank comprising a plurality of panels for forming a tubular structure, the blank comprising an end closure structure forforming an end wall, the end closure structure comprising a first end closure panel and a second end closure panel arranged to be disposed at least in part in overlapping relationship with the first end closure panel so as to define an overlapping region in a set-up carton, wherein the blank comprises a dispenser for facilitating access to the carton contents, the dispenser comprising: a detachable portion formed at least in part by a first portion of the end wall; a stopper wall formed at least in part by a second portion of the end wall; a first severance line in the first end closure panel; a second severance line defined in the second end closure panel; and a cutaway defined in the second end closure panel, the cutaway extending from a free edge of the second end closure panel to the second severance line, and wherein the cutaway defines an edge of a portion of the second end closure panel forming a part of the stopper wall. 15. A blank for forming a carton, the blank comprising a plurality of panels for forming a tubular structure and an end closure structure for forming an end wall, the end closure structure comprising a first end closure panel and a second end closure panel arranged to be disposed at least in part in overlapping relationship with the first end closure panel so as to define an overlapping region in a set-up carton, wherein the blank comprises a dispenser for facilitating access to the carton contents, the dispenser comprising: a detachable portion formed at least in part by a first part of the first end closure panel and in part by a first part of the second end closure panel; a stopper wall formed at least in part by a second part of the of the first end closure panel and in part by a second part of the second end closure panel; a first severance line in the first end closure panel; a second severance line defined in the second end closure panel; and 

 a cutaway defined in the second end closure panel, the cutaway extending from a free edge of the second end closure panel to the second severance line, and wherein the cutaway separates a first glue area provided by the first part of the second end closure panel from a second glue area provided by the second part of the second end closure panel.
